description: A sun-drenched corner unit just steps from the College Ave campus. Features hardwood floors and a view of the river that feels like a scene from a Ghibli film.
In the heart of the action! Perfect for students who want to be seconds away from the best ramen and bookstores in town.
A charming historic house with a wrap-around porch. It has a magical, slightly overgrown garden perfect for summer studying.
Modern luxury living near the Edison train station. Extremely quiet and safe, with a fitness center that overlooks a peaceful meadow.
Close to the Menlo Park Mall. A clean, wind-swept apartment with floor-to-ceiling windows and excellent natural light.
Breathtaking views of the Manhattan skyline. This brownstone apartment feels like a cozy wizard's loft, complete with exposed brick.
The ultimate urban retreat. High-end finishes and a private balcony where you can watch the world go by below.
A soaring glass tower near the PATH. The lobby smells like fresh rain and the roof deck features a pool straight out of a dreamscape.
Spacious and sleek. It's the kind of place where a soot sprite might hide in the corners until you turn on the light.
Steps from NJIT and Rutgers Newark. A sturdy, industrial-chic loft with massive windows that capture the sunset perfectly.
Historic charm meets modern convenience. The high ceilings make the space feel as vast as a forest clearing.
Living in the heart of history. This apartment is as quiet as a library and as elegant as a palace.
A cozy cottage-style apartment tucked away in a leafy neighborhood. Great for serious scholars seeking peace.
Modern building with a secret rooftop garden. It's the perfect spot for watching the stars on a clear New Jersey night.
Simple, honest living. A great first apartment for a student who values a short walk to the library over fancy amenities.
A massive family-sized apartment with huge closets. It feels like a safe harbor after a long day of commuting.
A charming walk-up with an old-fashioned fireplace (decorative). You can practically hear the steam whistles from the river.
Grandeur on the waterfront. Wide open spaces that feel as limitless as the ocean.
A renovated warehouse unit with iron beams and a story in every brick. Very close to the Prudential Center.
The peak of Princeton elegance. Overlooking the square, it's like living in a classic storybook.
A brand new development with large windows and a communal kitchen that brings residents together like a big family.
Peaceful and quiet. The surrounding trees turn a brilliant gold in the autumn, making every window look like a painting.
Classic Hoboken charm. The creaky floors and tall windows tell of a century of people coming and going.
A vibrant community atmosphere with a courtyard that feels like a hidden forest glen in the middle of the city.
An affordable gem right on Military Park. Watch the seasons change from your high-rise view.
Eclectic and artsy. This unit is full of unexpected nooks and crannies that are perfect for reading by candlelight.
Perfect for a group of friends. A large, sprawling house with enough room for everyone to have their own little world.
Conveniently located for commuters. The thick walls keep it as quiet as a mountaintop house despite being near the main road.
A massive penthouse unit with a private roof deck. Watch the rain clouds roll in over the Hudson River.
The center of the world. You're so close to the water you can almost feel the spray of the waves.
Modern luxury in a historic setting. Massive windows overlook the city skyline and the cherry blossoms in spring.
In the heart of the Ironbound. Walking distance to the best Portuguese food in the world.
A grand estate apartment with vaulted ceilings. It feels like a sanctuary sequestered from the modern world.
Perfect for a graduate student. Simple, elegant, and directly across from the university gates.
Sleek and modern with a focus on convenience. The MetroPark station is just a short hop away.
A suburban paradise. Quiet, leafy streets and a community pool that feels like a hidden lagoon.
Efficient and bright. A great spot for those who spend their days in the lab and their nights in the clouds.
Classic student housing with a premium touch. The high ceilings make it feel like a wizard's study.
Pure elegance on the gold coast. Every morning feels like a fresh start in a dream.
Wide open views and a kitchen that would make a chef blush. It's a sanctuary in the sky.
Spacious loft living. Perfect for a growing creative family or a group of ambitious friends.
Luxury rentals with a view of the Raritan. Watch the rowing teams practice from your balcony.
A quiet retreat on a tree-lined street. The kind of place where you can hear the birds sing in the morning.
Traditional Hoboken charm with a modern kitchen. Plenty of light and a cozy atmosphere.
A massive townhouse-style unit. It's your own private castle in the heart of Jersey.
Waterfront living at its finest. The lobby feels like a grand hotel and the views are unmatched.
In the heart of Paulus Hook. Cobblestone streets and a neighborhood that feels like a village.
Bright and airy with massive windows. Great for students and young professionals alike.
A historic gem with modern updates. You can practically feel the brilliance of the past in the walls.
Close to the train station and the best coffee shops. It's the perfect base for your Jersey adventures.
